impact: This advances PP&D guardrails by proving account-scoped case-state data remains redacted, source-linked, and blocked from consequential or financial planning unless explicit user confirmation is present.
summary: Add a narrow redacted user-case-state fixture and validator covering missing facts, file placeholders, draft/submitted status, payment status, messages, outstanding tasks, and default action blocking.
target_task: Task checkbox-108: Task checkbox-103: Add validation for user-case-state fixtures proving missing facts, file placeholders, draft/submitted status, payment status, messages, and outstanding tasks remain redacted, source-linked, and blocked from consequential or financial action planning by default.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
